intro: Munbya polystachia is a shrub-like plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in African herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
